reasoning_model_1: Model 1 fails significantly on Content Accuracy. The user requested the specific sentence '哎，又是一个无聊的周末。', but the model hallucinated and generated a long paragraph describing boredom ('连空气都懒得动弹...', etc.), which violates the script instruction. Regarding the required paralinguistic feature 'sighing' (非语言发声 - 叹气), the audio lacks any non-verbal sighing sounds. The delivery is surprisingly energetic and bright, resembling a lively storytelling tone rather than a weary, bored expression accompanied by a sigh. Therefore, it fails both content and style constraints.
reasoning_model_2: Model 2 performs excellent on Content Accuracy, strictly speaking only the requested sentence '哎，又是一个无聊的周末。' without additions or omissions. Regarding the 'sighing' feature, there is a very distinct, natural non-verbal exhalation/sigh at the very beginning (0:00-0:01) before the speech starts. The prosody of the speech follows this sigh perfectly, utilizing a low-pitched, weary, and slow-paced tone that embodies the feeling of boredom and resignation. The integration of the breathy sigh with the spoken text is seamless and high-quality.
model_comparison: Model 2 is the clear winner. Model 1 completely failed to adhere to the script length, generating a large amount of unrequested text. Furthermore, Model 1's tone was energetic and lacked the requested non-verbal sigh. Model 2 followed the script exactly and successfully generated a realistic, audible sigh at the beginning, followed by a tone that perfectly matched the context of the command.
